ComJSugarcane .--In exercise , of the pewers conferred by Section 3 of the Essential Com- modities Act, 1955 (10 of 1955), the Central Government hereby makes the following Order further to amend the Sugarcane (Control) Order, 1966, namely :- .. 1. (1) This Order may be called the Sugarcane (Control) (Amendment) Order, 2(X)7. (2) It shall come into force on the dare of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2.
